name: Chocolate-Rum Flan
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sugar to caramelize the pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milks, eggs, egg yolks, chocolate, and rum in a food processor or blender and process well.
2. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
3. Heat the sugar in a heavy-bottomed saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly until the sugar has melted and is a light amber color, about 20 minutes.
4. Pour the caramel into 6 individual 8-oz ramekins or molds, or a 9x4 inch loaf pan.
5. Pour the flan mixture over the caramel.
6. Place in a water bath and bake uncovered for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to 350 degrees F and continue baking until set, when a knife inserted comes out clean, about 30 more minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
9. To serve, run a knife around the edges of the ramekins or mold and invert the flans onto a serving platter or individual plates.
